name: Johnny Trigger - Action Shooter
author: Poki
description: Johnny Trigger - Action Shooter is a platform shooting game where style meets precision! As the unstoppable Johnny Trigger, your mission is simple: take down the bad guys with smooth, well-timed shots as you jump across various platforms. Johnny never stops moving, so you’ll need quick reflexes and sharp aim. Be cautious, though—hostages are scattered around, and you’ve got just one chance to shoot without hitting them. Ready for some non-stop action? How to play Johnny Trigger - Action Shooter? Click to shoot. Who created Johnny Trigger - Action Shooter? Johnny Trigger - Action Shooter is created by SayGames.
